revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-290

Alternative term: Inter-site error

An error of bearing, other than source error, due to scattering or lateral deviation by irregularities in, or obstacles on, the earth's surface outside the site of the direction finder.


Note: In ground-wave transmission such an error may be called Ground-path error or

Heterogeneous ground-path error.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Distant site error}}
